metadata_checks.comments: Title/DOI/year/paper type are correct. Tax scope is mixed: the relevant outcome is support for carbon tax/cap-and-trade, not a tax-only estimate.

determinant_checks.comment: Directly associated with support for carbon tax/cap and trade (r=.207, k=31). Correlational, and the policy outcome is pooled with ETS.

final_recommendation_summary: Keep. The extraction contains one directly relevant determinant and no extraneous tax-irrelevant predictors; note that the policy outcome is pooled carbon tax/cap-and-trade support, not a pure carbon-tax estimate.
